title: Surgeries | Dave Doogan MP Angus & Perthshire Glens
headings: h3: Upcoming Surgeries in Angus and Perthshire Glens
text_excerpt: --> Surgeries | Dave Doogan MP Angus & Perthshire Glens top of page ​ ​ ​ Home About Surgeries In the Constituency In Parliament Contact Me SSEN News More Use tab to navigate through the menu items. Upcoming Surgeries Upcoming Surgeries in Angus and Perthshire Glens You can see my upcoming constituency surgeries below. This page is regularly updated. ​ I regularly hold surgeries at: Brechin, Aberfeldy, Dunkeld, Coupar Angus, Montrose, Edzell, Kirriemuir, Forfar, Pitlochry, Birkhill, Stanley, Luncarty, Blairgowrie and Alyth. ​ If you wish to book a slot at a surgery, please get in touch via the button below. Contact Me Thursday 21st May 09:20 - 10:20 Strathmore Hub, COUPAR ANGUS Friday 22nd May 12:45 - 13:15 Venue tbc, KINLOCH RANNOCH Friday 22nd May 13:40 - 14:10 Venue Tbc, TUMMEL BRIDGE Friday 22nd May 14:45 - 15:30 Venue Tbc, KILLIECRANKIE Friday 22nd May 14:45 - 15:30 Venue Tbc, GRANDTULLY Newsletter Stay up to date with all the latest from Dave Doogan MP.
